title: The Modern Web: Multi-device Web Development with HTML5, CSS3, and Javascript
author: Peter Gasston
description: Peter Gasston's The Modern Web will guide you through the latest and most important tools of device-agnostic  web development, including HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. His plain-English explanations and practical examples emphasize the techniques, principles, and practices that you'll need to easily transcend individual browser quirks and stay relevant as these technologies are updated.
